name: @podosoft/podokit-monorepo
description: PodoKit monorepo — starter toolkit and CLI for full-stack TypeScript apps.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @podosoft/podokit-contracts && npm run build -w @podosoft/podokit-auth && npm run build -w @podosoft/podokit-template-engine && npm run build -w @podosoft/podokit-api-client && npm run build -w @podosoft/podokit && npm run build -w @podosoft/podokit-mcp
